e2ee/chacha

  • Index

        decrypt
      • decrypt(cipherText: seq[uint8]; key: Key32; nonce: Nonce24): string
        encrypt
      • encrypt(plainText: string; key: Key32; nonce: Nonce24): seq[uint8]
        seal
      • seal(plainText: string; key: Key32): ChachaMessage
        sealWithPassword
      • sealWithPassword(plainText, password: string; salt: RandomBytes): ChachaMessage
        unseal
      • unseal(msg: ChachaMessage; key: Key32): string
        unsealWithPassword
      • unsealWithPassword(msg: ChachaMessage; password: string; salt: RandomBytes): string

This module provides a simple interface for encrypting and decrypting messages using XChaCha20 stream cipher. It includes functions for encrypting and decrypting messages with a given key and nonce, as well as a high-level sealing and opening API that generates a random nonce for each message.

Imports

private/monocypher, private/utils, password

Types

ChachaMessage = object
  nonce*: Nonce24            ## A random nonce used for encryption. Must be unique
                             ## for each message encrypted with the same key.
  cipherText*: seq[uint8]    ## The encrypted message as a sequence of bytes.
The ChachaMessage type represents an encrypted message using XChaCha20.

Procs

proc decrypt(cipherText: seq[uint8]; key: Key32; nonce: Nonce24): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decrypts the cipherText using XChaCha20 with the given key and nonce. 
proc encrypt(plainText: string; key: Key32; nonce: Nonce24): seq[uint8] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Encrypts the plainText using XChaCha20 with the given key and nonce. 
proc seal(plainText: string; key: Key32): ChachaMessage {.
    ...raises: [OSError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Encrypts the plainText with a random nonce, returns ChachaMessage. 
proc sealWithPassword(plainText, password: string; salt: RandomBytes): ChachaMessage {.
    ...raises: [OSError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Encrypts plainText using a key derived from password+salt, with a random nonce. 
proc unseal(msg: ChachaMessage; key: Key32): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Decrypts the ChachaMessage using the provided key. 
proc unsealWithPassword(msg: ChachaMessage; password: string; salt: RandomBytes): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decrypts the ChachaMessage using a key derived from password+salt.
